summary: Completed comprehensive testing of MedDevice Pro B2B medical device portfolio website + CRM. All 26 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed including homepage, products page, product detail, contact form, admin login, admin dashboard, admin leads CRM, and admin products page.
passed_tests: GET /api/divisions returns 8 divisions with product counts
GET /api/products/:id returns single product with all fields
POST /api/admin/login with password 'admin' returns JWT token
frontend_tests_passed: Homepage loads with hero section, divisions grid (8 divisions), featured products, CTAs
Mega menu shows 8 divisions with categories
Footer shows MD-42 License, GST number, regulatory info
Products page shows grid/list view with 45 products
Products page division filter sidebar works (8 divisions)
Product detail page shows specs, material, quote form, WhatsApp button
Product detail quote form submits lead successfully
Contact page form submits lead successfully with success message
Admin login at /admin/login with password 'admin' works
Admin dashboard shows stats cards (Products, Total Leads, Hot/Warm/Cold/New Leads)
Admin dashboard shows Products by Division breakdown
Admin leads page shows lead table with score badges (Hot/Warm/Cold)
Admin leads page lead detail drawer opens with notes functionality
Admin products page shows product table with division filter
Admin logout redirects to login page
critical_code_review_comments: All APIs are working correctly with proper authentication
Lead scoring algorithm correctly calculates Hot (>=60), Warm (35-59), Cold (<35)
45 products seeded across 8 divisions as expected
All data-testid attributes present for UI testing
seed_data_creation: 45 products seeded across 8 divisions (Orthopedics, Trauma, Cardiovascular, Diagnostics, ENT, Endo-surgical, Infection Prevention, Peripheral Intervention)

features_verified.product_catalog: 45 products across 8 divisions with filtering, search, pagination
features_verified.lead_capture: Contact form and product quote form create leads with auto-scoring
features_verified.lead_scoring: Bulk Quote=40pts, Hospital=15pts, Email=10pts, District=10pts, Product Interest=15pts
features_verified.admin_dashboard: Stats cards, products by division chart, leads by inquiry type
features_verified.admin_leads_crm: Lead table with score badges, status management, notes, delete
features_verified.admin_products: Product table with division filter, search, delete
features_verified.footer_regulatory: MD-42 License, GST number, ISO 13485 certification

context_for_next_testing_agent: All features working correctly. 45 products seeded. Lead scoring algorithm verified. Admin CRM fully functional. No issues found.
